assessment.note: Names a specific missing support need — defining what good looks like on the next two tickets — which signals mild clarity and steadiness gaps during onboarding.

new_queue.label: Two-week takeaway
new_queue.name: Given what we covered, where do you want to focus first over the next two weeks?
new_queue.description: Closes by letting Sam choose the most useful near-term focus from the onboarding friction surfaced.
